历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the lowest science rankings were approximately 158 → 1148 → 387 → 390. In 2022, there was a significant fluctuation (1148th), but the last two years stabilized in the 387–390 range. The 2024 baseline is about 390th. From 2021 to 2024, the science enrollment plan was 8 students each year. In 2026, the physics category plan is 8 students, consistent with recent years, with no expansion or contraction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 21st, stable in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top national universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication leading to dismissal), teacher ethics (multiple teachers reported by name), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 36th), with average attention. Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Physics A, Statistics A, Biology A, etc., with strong basic sciences. Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) corresponds to Computer Category (highly recommended), Science Experimental Class (Material Science) corresponds to Chemistry/Materials Category (clearly discouraged).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the Computer Category popularity is recommended, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended (76.86), engineering hot majors have strong appeal. Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials categories are generally wait-and-see (64.69), Material Science popularity is average. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 48,000, estimated physics category about 30,672, slightly increased from 30,457 in 2025, competition slightly intensified, but 2026 data is missing. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with a very small enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province (about 0.4%), regional preference impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2024 baseline ranking of 390th, the 2026 plan unchanged, negative reputation (application heat slightly decreased, ranking moved back), and a slight increase in candidates, the estimated 2026 science lowest ranking is about 395th, with a range of 345–445.

For rankings significantly above the lower limit of the range, focus on reaching for hot information majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication leading to dismissal) and teacher ethics (multiple teachers reported by real names), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 36th overall), with moderate attention. Disciplines include A+ in Chemistry, A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Applied Economics, A+ in Mathematics, A in Statistics, A in Theoretical Economics, etc. The economics and management disciplines are outstanding, highly matching the liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration).
